```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

authors    <- rmarkdown::metadata[["pub-authors"]]
year       <- rmarkdown::metadata[["pub-year"]]
venue      <- rmarkdown::metadata[["venue"]]
doi        <- rmarkdown::metadata[["doi"]]

has_value <- function(x) {
  if (is.null(x)) return(FALSE)
  if (length(x) == 0) return(FALSE)
  char_vals <- as.character(x)
  any(!is.na(char_vals) & nzchar(char_vals))
}

format_authors <- function(x) {
  char_vals <- as.character(x)
  if (length(char_vals) == 1) return(char_vals)
  if (length(char_vals) == 2) return(paste(char_vals, collapse = " & "))
  paste0(
    paste(char_vals[-length(char_vals)], collapse = ", "),
    ", & ",
    char_vals[length(char_vals)]
  )
}

parts <- c('<div class="pub-header">')

# Authors
if (has_value(authors)) {
  parts <- c(parts, sprintf(
    '<div class="pub-header-authors">%s</div>',
    format_authors(authors)
  ))
}

# Year · Journal (combined line)
venue_parts <- c()
if (has_value(year))  venue_parts <- c(venue_parts, sprintf('<span class="pub-header-year">%s</span>', as.character(year)))
if (has_value(venue)) venue_parts <- c(venue_parts, sprintf('<span class="pub-header-venue">%s</span>', as.character(venue)))

if (length(venue_parts) > 0) {
  parts <- c(parts, sprintf(
    '<div class="pub-header-citation">%s</div>',
    paste(venue_parts, collapse = '<span class="pub-header-sep">·</span>')
  ))
}

# DOI (optional — small link under citation)
if (has_value(doi)) {
  doi_clean <- sub("^https?://(dx\\.)?doi\\.org/", "", as.character(doi))
  parts <- c(parts, sprintf(
    '<div class="pub-header-doi"><a href="https://doi.org/%s" target="_blank" rel="noopener">doi.org/%s</a></div>',
    doi_clean, doi_clean
  ))
}

parts <- c(parts, '</div>')

cat(paste(parts, collapse = ""))
```
